# Morphology

**Summary**: The study of the form and structure of organisms.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] analyzed morphological deformities in benthic foraminiferal assemblages.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Morphological deformities serve as indicators of environmental stress in hypersaline environments.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Visual inspection under microscopy.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified various types of deformities including chamber shrinkage, overdevelopment, and coiling orientation changes. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 105]])
